createUtxos.title: Create Colored UTXOs
createUtxos.description: Colored UTXOs are necessary for opening RGB asset lightning channels. They allow for the creation of asset-specific payment channels, enabling fast and secure transactions of RGB assets over the Lightning Network.

privacy.title: KaleidoSwap Privacy Policy
privacy.noticeBody: While the RGB protocol and RGB test net protocol attempt to build enhanced privacy into the transactions in RGB tokens or RGB test net tokens, as applicable, no encryption or privacy enhancing systems is ever completely secure. The RGB protocol and RGB test net protocol are experimental protocols and the Apps are experimental wallet applications for those experimental protocols. The Apps are subject to failure and may contain defects. Your transactions using the Apps may be exposed. We do not and we cannot guarantee the security of your data transmitted through the Apps; any transmission is at your own risk.

terms.title: TEST NET KALEIDOSWAP TERMS OF USE
noticeItems: THE APP OPERATES ON THE RGB TEST NET PROTOCOL AND TEST NET BITCOIN BLOCKCHAIN.
THE APP IS AN EXPERIMENTAL DIGITAL ASSET WALLET APPLICATION.
ALL USE OF THE APP IS AT YOUR OWN RISK.
YOU SHOULD NOT USE THE APP TO SEND OR RECEIVE TEST NET BTC OR RGB TEST NET TOKENS THAT YOU ARE NOT PREPARED TO LOSE ENTIRELY.

roleSelector.title: Your Role
roleSelector.makerDescription: As a <maker>maker</maker>, you can initiate and execute swaps. Switch to <taker>taker</taker> role to whitelist incoming swaps.
roleSelector.takerDescription: As a <taker>taker</taker>, you can whitelist incoming swaps. Switch to <maker>maker</maker> role to initiate and execute swaps.

swapExplanation.title: How Atomic Swaps Work

trustless.title: Trustless Exchange
trustless.description: Atomic swaps allow two parties to exchange different assets without trusting each other or using a third party.

locks.title: Cryptographic Locks
locks.description: The swap uses cryptographic hash locks to ensure that either both parties receive their assets or neither does.

guarantee.title: Atomic Guarantee
guarantee.description: The "atomic" property ensures that the swap either completes fully or not at all, eliminating counterparty risk.

makerInitiates.title: Maker Initiates
makerInitiates.description: The maker defines the assets and amounts to swap and generates a swap string.

takerWhitelists.title: Taker Whitelists
takerWhitelists.description: The taker reviews the swap terms and whitelists the swap string to accept the trade.

makerExecutes.title: Maker Executes
makerExecutes.description: The maker executes the swap, triggering the atomic exchange of assets between both parties.

makerRole.title: Maker Role
items: Initiate swaps by defining assets and amounts
Generate and share swap strings with takers
Execute swaps once the taker has whitelisted you
Control both the initiation and execution phases

takerRole.title: Taker Role
items: Whitelist the swap string to accept the trade
Wait for the maker to execute the swap

liquidity.title: Liquidity Requirements
liquidity.intro: For atomic swaps to succeed, both parties need:
items: Sufficient liquidity of the assets being exchanged in their lightning channels
Bitcoin liquidity for routing payments between the maker and taker
Active and balanced channels connecting both parties
liquidity.note: If liquidity is insufficient, the swap may fail even if it has been properly whitelisted.

swapExplanation.collapsedHint: Click to expand and learn more about how atomic swaps work and the roles involved.

errors.proxyEndpointMissing: プロキシトランスポートエンドポイントが設定されていません。
errors.rgbPaymentFailed: RGBアセット支払いに失敗しました。

errors.lightningFailedDetailed: Lightning支払いに失敗しました: {{error}}

errors.capacityToast: 続行できません: インボイス金額({{amount}}サトシ)がアウトバウンド容量({{capacity}}サトシ)を超えています。

warnings.invoiceAdjusted: 警告: インボイスは{{requested}} {{asset}}を要求していますが、残高は{{balance}} {{asset}}のみです。最大送信可能額に調整されました。
warnings.noRgbAssets: 警告: 送信可能なRGBアセットがありません。

lightning.lowCapacityWarning: 可視容量が低いです。支払いを試すことはできますが、失敗する可能性があります。
lightning.withinCapacity: 支払い金額はアウトバウンド容量内です
lightning.insufficientAsset: この支払いに対してLightningチャネル内の{{ticker}}が不足しています。

rgb.title: RGBインボイス詳細

overlay.title: 支払い失敗

status.checking: 支払いステータスを確認中... しばらくお待ちください。

confirmation.rgbNotice: これはRGBアセット転送です。プロセスは完了まで数分かかり、受取人の確認が必要です。

dashboard.title: Wallet Dashboard
dashboard.nodePublicKeyCopied: Node public key copied to clipboard
dashboard.inboundLiquidityTooltip: Maximum amount of {{unit}} that you can receive through Lightning Network channels. This represents the total amount others can send to you.
dashboard.outboundLiquidityTooltip: Maximum amount of {{unit}} that you can send through Lightning Network channels. This represents your available balance for making payments.
dashboard.liquidityInfo: Channel liquidity changes as you send and receive payments. Keep your channels balanced for optimal performance.
dashboard.noFundsMessage: You don't have any Bitcoin funds in your wallet. Deposit funds to start using the application.

history.description: View your transaction history, including deposits, payments, withdrawals, and swaps.

walletSetup.connectSubtitle: Choose your preferred way to connect to the network
walletSetup.remoteNodeDescription: Connect to a hosted node or self-hosted instance. Recommended for most users and advanced setups.
walletSetup.localNodeDescription: Run a node on your local machine. Ideal for developers and testing environments.
walletSetup.localNodeNotSupported: Local node is not supported on Windows. Use a remote node connection instead.
walletSetup.setupLocalSubtitle: Choose an option to get started with your local RGB Lightning node
walletSetup.createWalletDescription: Create a new wallet with a fresh seed phrase and set up your node.
walletSetup.restoreWalletDescription: Restore a wallet using your existing encrypted backup.
walletSetup.connectRemoteSubtitle: Connect to an existing RGB Lightning node hosted by you or a provider

createChannel.insufficientBalanceMessage: You need at least {{amount}} satoshis to open a channel. Please fund your wallet first.
createChannel.infoMessage: Opening a channel requires an on-chain transaction. Make sure you have sufficient Bitcoin balance to cover the channel capacity and transaction fees.
createChannel.errorMinCapacity: Channel capacity must be at least {{amount}} satoshis
createChannel.errorFetchFeeRates: Failed to fetch fee rates. Please try again.

step1.title: Peer Connection - Step 1
step1.subtitle: Select from connected peers or enter new connection details.
step1.noPeers: No peers currently connected. You can connect to a new peer below.
step1.invalidPeerFormat: Invalid peer format. Expected: <66-char-hex-pubkey>@hostname:port or valid pubkey
step1.helpText: The connection string should be a 66-character hex public key, followed by @ symbol, then the host address, and port number (e.g. :9735)

connectDialog.title: Connect to Peer
connectDialog.message: Would you like to connect to this peer before opening a channel?

step1.errorNoLspUrl: No default LSP URL configured for network: {{network}}
step1.errorFetchLsp: Failed to fetch LSP connection information
step1.errorConnectFailed: Failed to connect to peer. Please try again.

step2.title: Open a Channel - Step 2
step2.subtitle: Configure your channel capacity and assets
step2.capacityHint: (The amount of BTC you want to allocate to this channel)
step2.rgbAssetsSubtitle: Add RGB assets to your channel for asset transfers
step2.chooseAsset: Choose an RGB asset for your channel
step2.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, ticker or asset ID...
step2.assetRequired: You must select an asset to proceed. If you don't want to add an asset, uncheck the "Add Asset" option.
step2.selectAssetFirst: Please select an asset first to enter an amount
step2.noSpendableAssets: You do not have any spendable on-chain RGB assets to open a channel with.
step2.publicDescription: Visible on the Lightning Network and can be used for routing payments
step2.privateDescription: Only known to the two parties and cannot be used for routing
step2.privacyInfo: Public channels are discoverable and can route payments for the network. Private channels provide direct connectivity without network visibility.
step2.formError: Please check the form for errors
step2.errorMinCapacity: Channel capacity must be at least {{amount}} sats.
step2.errorAssetRequired: Please select an asset or uncheck the "Add Asset" option.
step2.errorAssetAmountRequired: Please enter an asset amount or remove the asset selection.
step2.warningAssetAdjusted: Amount exceeds maximum available: {{amount}}. Value has been adjusted.

step3.title: Open a Channel - Review
step3.subtitle: Confirm your channel details before proceeding
step3.errorInvalidNode: Please go back and enter valid node information
step3.rgbAssetInfo: This channel will include both Bitcoin liquidity and RGB asset allocation. The RGB asset ({{ticker}}) will be allocated with {{amount}} units.

step4.successMessage: The channel has been successfully created, you can now start trading.

supportModal.title: Support & Resources
supportModal.intro: Need help with KaleidoSwap? Here are several ways to get assistance:
supportModal.telegramGroupDesc: Join our community for support and discussion
supportModal.githubIssuesDesc: Report bugs or request new features
supportModal.troubleshootIntro: Here are some common issues and their solutions. If your issue isn't listed here, please contact us through one of the support channels.
supportModal.stillHavingIssues: Still having issues? Get personalized help from our community and developers:

connectionIssues.title: Connection issues
connectionIssues.description: Problems connecting to your RGB Lightning Node
connectionIssues.solution1: Check that your node is running
connectionIssues.solution2: Verify your connection settings in the Settings page
connectionIssues.solution3: Ensure your firewall allows connections to the required ports

channelCreationFailures.title: Channel creation failures
channelCreationFailures.description: Issues when trying to create new payment channels
channelCreationFailures.solution1: Ensure you have sufficient Bitcoin balance
channelCreationFailures.solution2: Check that your peer is online and accepting channels
channelCreationFailures.solution3: Verify you and your peer are connected to the same RGB proxy server
channelCreationFailures.solution4: Wait for any pending blockchain confirmations

paymentFailures.title: Payment failures
paymentFailures.description: Problems sending or receiving RGB payments
paymentFailures.solution1: Verify you have sufficient outbound liquidity in your channels
paymentFailures.solution2: Check that have enough colored UTXOs in your wallet
paymentFailures.solution3: Verify the invoice is correct and not expired

backupModal.title: Create Backup
backupModal.backupInProgressMessage: Please wait, the backup is in progress...
backupModal.backupLockedMessage: The node will be locked until the backup process is finished.

logoutModal.loggingOutMessage: Please wait while your wallet is being locked...
logoutModal.confirmLogoutMessage: Are you sure you want to logout? This will lock your wallet.

closeChannelModal.title: Close Channel
closeChannelModal.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to close this channel?
closeChannelModal.settleMessage: Closing a channel will settle the current balance to your on-chain wallet.
closeChannelModal.forceCloseCondition1: The peer is offline or unresponsive
closeChannelModal.forceCloseCondition2: The channel is stuck or in a problematic state
closeChannelModal.forceCloseCondition3: A regular cooperative close has failed
closeChannelModal.forceCloseWarning: Force closing may result in higher fees and longer confirmation times. Your funds will be locked in a time-locked contract until the timelock expires.
closeChannelModal.cooperativeCloseInfo: Cooperative closing (default) is faster, cheaper, and returns funds to your wallet after on-chain confirmation.
closeChannelModal.forceCloseQuestion: Would you like to force close this channel instead? Force closing:
closeChannelModal.forceCloseReason1: Does not require your peer to be online
closeChannelModal.forceCloseReason2: Will lock your funds in a timelock contract temporarily

errorBoundary.pageNotFoundMessage: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for.
errorBoundary.unexpectedErrorMessage: We're sorry, but an unexpected error has occurred.

termsStep.title: Welcome to KaleidoSwap

termsStep.description: Before you begin using KaleidoSwap, please review and accept our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

setupStep.bearerTokenDescription: Optional authentication token for remote node access

passwordStep.nodeAlreadyInitialized: Node is already initialized, attempting to unlock...
passwordStep.failedToStoreRecovery: Failed to securely store recovery phrase. Please try again.
passwordStep.stoppingExistingNodes: Stopping existing nodes on conflicting ports...

errors.portsInUse: Ports {{ports}} are in use by other applications. Please choose different ports or stop the conflicting applications.
